spec.name: A Sandstone Crypt
spec.description: This small crypt is lit by a hole in the wall to the south, through which sand pours from the desert outside. A hot wind blows in from the desert, drying your skin instantly. To the east and north the arched hallway continues.

north.description: The arched hallway collapses into rubble shortly to the north.

east.description: You see a beautifully arched hallway.

south.description: You see a lot of sand.
